message:
wa-ogc.9: achievement system with 13 definitions, rarity tiers, secret achievements

Add Rarity enum (Common/Uncommon/Rare/Epic), AchievementDefinition with
icons and secret flag, and 13 built-in achievements covering exercise
milestones, track completions, cross-track exploration, and secret goals
(SpeedRunner, NightOwl). Extend check_achievements to evaluate all
conditions. Add achievement_collection(), format_achievement_unlock(),
format_achievement_list() display methods. Wire `wa learn --achievements`
CLI command with JSON output support. 23 new tests covering definitions,
unlock conditions, collection display, persistence, and serialization.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
